title: Lifehacker's Big Guessing Game Is in Its Second Round
summary: Lifehacker, in partnership with the other CNET Group sites, is hosting the second round of its Big Guessing Game . This round has questions about Apple hardware (iPhones, iPads, Macs, Apple Watches, Vision Pro and so on.).
